sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38287" key="e)para/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπᾰράσιμος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ρᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n38287.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abominable,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
